field.label: Name
field.help: Unique name for this watcher (alphanumeric + underscores, max 32 chars).

field.label: Type
field.help: DNS Hostname: resolve a FQDN and sync resulting IPs into the alias. URL Table: fetch IP list from a URL (one IP/CIDR per line).

field.label: Hostname (legacy)
field.help: Single FQDN to resolve (legacy field, use Hostnames instead).

field.label: Hostnames
field.help: Comma-separated FQDNs to resolve (for DNS type). Example: office.example.com, home.ddns.net

field.label: URL
field.help: URL to fetch IP list from (for URL Table type). One IP/CIDR per line, # comments ignored. Example: https://www.cloudflare.com/ips-v4

field.label: Static IPs/CIDRs
field.help: Static IPs or CIDRs always included in this alias. Comma-separated. Example: 10.0.0.0/8, 192.168.1.0/24

field.label: Include Aliases
field.help: Merge IPs from these existing pf table aliases. Comma-separated alias names. Example: Public_IP, VPN_Hosts

field.label: Target Alias
field.help: Name of the OPNsense firewall alias to update. Must be an External (Advanced) type alias. Use the button below to browse existing aliases.

field.label: Check Interval (seconds)
field.help: How often to check for changes. DNS: 10-300s recommended. URL: 300-86400s recommended.

field.label: Address Family
field.help: For DNS type: resolve IPv4 only (A records), IPv6 only (AAAA), or both.
